hooks.command: node -e "console.error('[Hook] Review changes before push...');console.error('[Hook] Have all 5 test suites been run?')"

PreToolUse.description: Reminder before git push to review changes and run tests

hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/\.(md|txt)$/.test(p)&&!/(README|CLAUDE|AGENTS|CONTRIBUTING)\.md$/.test(p)&&!/PRPs[\/\\]/.test(p)&&!/docs[\/\\]/.test(p)&&!/\.claude[\/\\]/.test(p)){console.error('[Hook] BLOCKED: Unnecessary documentation file');console.error('[Hook] File: '+p);console.error('[Hook] Use README.md or create a PRP in PRPs/ instead');process.exit(1)}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Block creation of random .md files - use README.md or PRPs/

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/gh pr create/.test(cmd)){const out=i.tool_output?.output||'';const m=out.match(/https:\/\/github.com\/[^/]+\/[^/]+\/pull\/\d+/);if(m){console.error('[Hook] PR created: '+m[0]);const repo=m[0].replace(/https:\/\/github.com\/([^/]+\/[^/]+)\/pull\/\d+/,'$1');const pr=m[0].replace(/.*\/pull\/(\d+)/,'$1');console.error('[Hook] To review: gh pr review '+pr+' --repo '+repo)}}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Log PR URL and provide review command after PR creation

hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path;if(p&&fs.existsSync(p)){const c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');const lines=c.split('\n');const matches=[];lines.forEach((l,idx)=>{if(/Write-Host.*DEBUG|Write-Host.*TODO/.test(l))matches.push((idx+1)+': '+l.trim())});if(matches.length){console.error('[Hook] WARNING: Debug Write-Host found in '+p);matches.slice(0,5).forEach(m=>console.error(m));console.error('[Hook] Remove debug output before committing')}}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Warn about debug Write-Host statements after editing .ps1 files

hooks.command: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{execSync('git rev-parse --git-dir',{stdio:'pipe'})}catch{console.log(d);process.exit(0)}try{const files=execSync('git diff --name-only HEAD',{encoding:'utf8',stdio:['pipe','pipe','pipe']}).split('\n').filter(f=>/\.ps1$/.test(f)&&fs.existsSync(f));let hasDebug=false;for(const f of files){const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(/Write-Host.*DEBUG|Write-Host.*TODO/.test(c)){console.error('[Hook] WARNING: Debug Write-Host found in '+f);hasDebug=true}}if(hasDebug)console.error('[Hook] Remove debug output before committing')}catch(e){}console.log(d)})"

Stop.description: Check for debug Write-Host in modified .ps1 files before session ends
